The '''Bay of Sypon''' was a body of water on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brosi]]. The [[West Reyno River]] emptied into the Bay, and locations along the coastline included the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Rann]], the [[Shoengen Coast]], and the [[Shoengen Delta]]. Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], it was located in the [[Brosin Underground]]'s area of influence.
